cases.description: Average of cells in the range itself that satisfy the criteria
Criteria evaluated against A but matching B cells are averaged
cases.expected_note: Rows 3,4,5 satisfy A>2; average of paired B = (30+40+50)/3

cases.description: No cells satisfy the criteria -> #DIV/0! per Microsoft docs (same as AVERAGE of an empty set)
Blank cells in average_range are excluded from both the sum and the count, not treated as 0
cases.expected_note: A1:A3 all satisfy >0, but B2 is blank; average is (10+30)/2=20, not (10+0+30)/3
